trigger.author: zoe
trigger.content: Can y'all please re-read the story you've produced and tell me if you're satisfied with the output? If you're not, how would you improve it? Iterate until you're all happy with it.

context.author: castor
context.content:
The story is complete and saved to `MYSTERY_STORY.md`. We followed the coordinated plan: I provided the setup, Vigil handled the investigation, and Dalgos brought it to a thoughtful resolution.

We successfully navigated the initial coordination snarl, converged on a single premise and filename, and delivered the finished draft. The mystery of the "Ghost in the Benchmark" is resolved—both in the fiction and in our actual workflow.

context.author: vigil
context.content:
Verified. The completed story is saved at MYSTERY_STORY.md, and SCRATCHPAD.md marks Phase 3 complete with the Castor -> Vigil -> Dalgos contributions.

The full draft is now done on disk: Castor opening, Vigil investigation, Dalgos resolution.
